import{UserStatsEvent}from'./UserStatsEvent';import{Nitro}from'@nitrots/nitro-renderer';export const USER_STATS=4001;Nitro.instance.communication.registerMessageEvent(new UserStatsEvent(parser=>{console.log('Stats received:',{health:parser.health,maxHealth:parser.maxHealth,energy:parser.energy,maxEnergy:parser.maxEnergy,hunger:parser.hunger,maxHunger:parser.maxHunger,xp:parser.xp,maxXp:parser.maxXp});// here you could dispatch to Zustand or hooks
}));
